## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. macOS Sequoia, Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Electron Version: [e.g. 37.4.0]
- App Version: [e.g. 0.0.1]

## Additional context
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., error stack traces from developer tools).
